# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

deployment:
  name: cloudshell-dm-vpc-2
  managerVersion: "0.1"
  resources:
    - type: compute.v1.network
      name: network-default
      properties:
        autoCreateSubnetworks: true
    - type: compute.v1.router
      name: router-default
      properties:
        networks:
          - networkRef:
              selfLink: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/gce-vpc-2020-1879536404128-regional-us-east1-network-default?alt=json
            network: default
    - type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
      name: fw-default-internet
      properties:
        IPProtocol: TCP
        ipAddress: 0.0.0.0/0 # All addresses
        loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
        ports:
          - 80
  description: "An example of GCP Deployment Manager."
